dublinCore.dc:title: 119 HR 7113 IH: To redesignate the Congressional Budget Office as the “China Budget Office”.
dublinCore.dc:rights: Pursuant to Title 17 Section 105 of the United States Code, this file is not subject to copyright protection and is in the public domain.

action.action-desc: Mr. Mills introduced the following bill; which was referred to the Committee on the Budget

form.official-title: To redesignate the Congressional Budget Office as the China Budget Office.

section.header: Redesignation of the Congressional Budget Office as the China Budget Office

subsection.text: The Congressional Budget Office is hereby redesignated as the China Budget Office.

Any reference to the Congressional Budget Office in any law, rule, regulation, certificate, directive, instruction, or other official paper in force on the date of enactment of this Act shall be considered to refer and apply to the China Budget Office.
